name: Worsening symptoms recorded and check-in ends
description: Reports night symptoms, high reliever use and post-exercise wheezing. After exception mode clarifications, the deferred activity limitation question is re-raised; answering it ends the check-in and generates a Disease Card.

script.text: I wheezed badly after running today
It started about 20 minutes after I started running
Yes, my chest felt tight and I was short of breath
I used my reliever inhaler and it eased after a few minutes

expectations.description: Severe symptom report triggers exception mode clarifying question
Check-in ends after answering the re-raised deferred question
A Disease Card is generated after the check-in
